raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Pedestrian fatalities reached a four-decade high in 2020, with California having the most pedestrian fatalities in the nation.",
    "Vehicles have been steadily increasing in size and weight since the 1980s, with some models now weighing several thousand pounds.",
    "A pedestrian was killed every 81 minutes and injured every 10 minutes in traffic crashes in 2020.",
    "Pedestrian deaths accounted for 17% of all traffic fatalities and 2% of all people injured in traffic crashes.",
    "Late-model SUVs are more likely to kill pedestrians than cars, according to a study from the Insurance Institute for Highway Safety.",
    "Bigger cars lead to deadlier accidents."
  ]
}
```
